author: nflaig
content: `get_sample_genesis_execution_payload` is confusing lol, we pass the `eth1_block_hash` hash but the only value where this is set is `prev_randao`?

author: m.kalinin
content: after this change, yes. before that `eht1_block_hash` was set as the `block_hash` of the genesis payload. Now the `block_hash` is computed from other fields that comprise genesis payload

author: nflaig
content: ah I think this makes sense because we seed `state.randao_mixes = [eth1_block_hash]`, is that correct?

author: nflaig
content: I approved the PR I don't see any issues with it
